analyses.covariates: `age_years`, `sex_female`, `ecog_ps`, `stage_iv`, `right_sided_primary`, KRAS/NRAS/BRAF/MSI/HER2/NTRK biomarkers, CEA, albumin, LDH, weight loss, CRP, NLR, liver/bone/adrenal/pleural/pericardial metastasis or effusion indicators, and treatment indicators

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_regorafenib` with `pfs_months` is smaller for each one-standard-deviation increase in `albumin_g_dl`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS interaction model for reg_albumin
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_regorafenib` by `albumin_g_dl` per 1 SD: interaction coefficient -0.039 months (SE 0.010, z -4.05, p=5.19e-5); significant.
analyses.covariates: `age_years`, `sex_female`, `ecog_ps`, `stage_iv`, `right_sided_primary`, KRAS/NRAS/BRAF/MSI/HER2/NTRK biomarkers, CEA, albumin, LDH, weight loss, CRP, NLR, liver/bone/adrenal/pleural/pericardial metastasis or effusion indicators, and treatment indicators
